prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约9968→7935→8099→12950→11858，2024年因贵州首年新高考改革位次大幅后移至12950，2025年小幅回升至11858，近两年波动较大， 2025年基准约11858名；2021–2025年物理类计划数分别为141、140、144、130、141人，2026年计划大幅扩招至182人，较2025年增加41人（+29.1%），扩 招幅度显著，将明显拉低录取门槛，位次数字预计后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年稳定在48–55名区间（2026年第54名），属全国中上游水 平，在211高校中处于前列；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全事件（南湖校区不明巨型生物活动），可能轻微影响考生报考意愿；抖音热度排名第9 8（一般），综合热度较低，整体曝光度不高；材料科学与工程A、机械工程A-、交通运输工程A-，均为该校王牌学科，对应招生专业中的材料类、机械类、交通 运输类等，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业持续高热推荐，与该校优势工科方向高度契合；贵州省2026 年高考总人数约29.9万，物理类考生估算约20.6万，较2025年（20.7万）略降，竞争压力略有缓解；武汉理工大学位于湖北武汉 ，属中部地区核心城市，对西南省份考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在贵州招生规模较大（2026年物理类182人），属省外重点生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位 次11858、2026年大幅扩招29.1%（供需弹性主值13927）、考生规模略降、声誉偏负面但优势学科吸引力强等因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次较2025年明显后移，但扩招效 应部分被学科吸引力抵消；预测最低位次约13877名，区间13377–14377名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、电子科学与技术、智能科学与技术、通信工程）
- 自动化类（自动化、机器人工程）
- 机械设计制造及其自动化
- 人工智能。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械类（车辆）（车辆工程、汽车服务工程、储能科学与工程）
- 交通运输类（交通运输、交通工程、交通设备与控制工程）
- 数学类（信息与计算科学、统计学）
- 材料类（材料成型及控制工程、材料科学与工程、无机非金属材料工程等）
- 能源与动力工程（新能源动力）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化工与制药类（含生物方向）
- 工商管理类（人力资源管理、工商管理、会计学、创业管理）
- 土木类（土木工程、建筑环境与能源应用工程、给排水科学与工程、工程管理）
- 环境科学与工程类（环境工程、采矿工程、矿物加工工程）
- 物流工程（智慧物流技术与装备）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类大幅扩招，预测位次约13877名，区间13377–14377名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如13000名以内）可重 点冲刺计算机类、电子信息类等热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如14000名以外）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9968 → 7935 → 8099 → 12950 → 11858. In 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform in Guizhou, the ranking significantly dropped to 12950, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 11858, showing large fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 11858. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 141, 140, 144, 130, and 141 respectively. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 182 students, an increase of 41 students (+29.1%) compared to 2025. This substantial expansion will notably lower the admission threshold, and the ranking number is expected to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has been stable in the 48–55 range in recent years (54th in 2026), placing it at the upper-middle level nationally and among the top tier of 211 universities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to campus safety incidents (unidentified giant biological activity at Nanhu Campus), which may slightly affect candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 98 (average), with relatively low overall exposure. Materials Science and Engineering (A), Mechanical Engineering (A-), and Transportation Engineering (A-) are its flagship disciplines, corresponding to enrollment majors such as Materials, Mechanical, and Transportation categories, which strongly attract candidates interested in these fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, aligning well with the university's advantageous engineering fields. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou Province is about 299,000, with an estimated 206,000 Physics Category candidates, a slight decrease from 2025 (207,000), easing competition slightly. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, a core city in central China, which has some regional appeal for candidates from southwestern provinces. The university has a large enrollment scale in Guizhou (182 Physics Category students in 2026), making it one of the key provinces for out-of-province student recruitment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11858, the significant 29.1% enrollment expansion in 2026 (supply-demand elasticity main value 13927), a slight decrease in candidate numbers, a slightly negative reputation but strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly move backward compared to 2025, but the expansion effect is partially offset by the appeal of disciplines. The predicted minimum ranking is about 13877, with a range of 13377–14377.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information Category (Electronic Information Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Communication Engineering)
- Automation Category (Automation, Robotics Engineering)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Category (Vehicles) (Vehicle Engineering, Automotive Service Engineering, Energy Storage Science and Engineering)
- Transportation Category (Transportation, Traffic Engineering, Traffic Equipment and Control Engineering)
- Mathematics Category (Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Materials Category (Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Inorganic Non-metallic Materials Engineering, etc.)
- Energy and Power Engineering (New Energy Power).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Category (including Biological Direction)
- Business Administration Category (Human Resource Management, Business Administration, Accounting, Entrepreneurship Management)
- Civil Engineering Category (Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering, Engineering Management)
- Environmental Science and Engineering Category (Environmental Engineering, Mining Engineering, Mineral Processing Engineering)
- Logistics Engineering (Smart Logistics Technology and Equipment).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category sees a significant enrollment expansion, with a predicted ranking of about 13877, range 13377–14377. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 for sprinting and Tier 3 as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 13000), prioritize sprinting for popular majors like Computer and Electronic Information. For rankings near the upper limit (e.g., beyond 14000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranking Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1836 → 1751 → 1956 → 2734 → 2703. In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao reform in Guizhou, the ranking significantly shifted backward to 2734. In 2025, it remained roughly stable at 2703, with the last two years showing stability. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2703. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for History Category were 15, 16, 17, 36, and 36 respectively. In 2024, due to the new Gaokao reform, enrollment expanded significantly to 36. In 2026, the plan further expands to 46, an increase of 10 students (+27.8%) compared to 2025. This substantial expansion will lower the admission threshold, and the ranking number is expected to shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has been stable in the 48–55 range in recent years (54th in 2026), placing it at the upper-middle level nationally and among the top tier of 211 universities. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety incidents, which may mildly affect candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 98th (average), with overall low exposure. Materials Science and Engineering (A), Mechanical Engineering (A-), and Transportation Engineering (A-) are all science and engineering disciplines, which have low relevance to the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Economics, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, etc.). Liberal arts majors lack A-level discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially recommended (slightly hot), Economics is divided and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, and Business Administration is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou is approximately 299,000, with an estimated 93,000 History Category candidates, a slight increase from 2025 (90,000), leading to slightly increased competition. Wuhan University of Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, which has some regional appeal for candidates from southwestern provinces. In 2026, the History Category plans to enroll 46 students, a moderate enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2703, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 27.8% (supply-demand elasticity main value 3153), a slight increase in History Category candidates, and the lack of A-level discipline support for liberal arts majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will significantly shift backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3123, with a range of 2623–3623.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Law (Law, Social Work, Intellectual Property (Digital Social Governance))
- Economics (Economics, Finance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Network and New Media
- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, French)
- Ideological and Political Education.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the History Category has a relatively large enrollment expansion, with a predicted ranking of approximately 3123, range 2623–3623. For rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, use Tier 1 for sprinting, and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2600), focus on sprinting for popular majors like Law and Economics. For rankings close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 3500), it is recommended to use Business Administration as a safety.
